expectations.text: [defect_replay][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: missing scenario generation for template-save and report-builder loading
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the benchmark focus and addresses both items: "Benchmark focus: missing scenario generation for template-save and report-builder loading" and then provides sections "Template-save / Save-As overwrite..." and "Report-builder loading..." with concrete missing scenarios (Save As→overwrite conflict/confirmation; loading indicators; prompt elements after double-click).

expectations.text: [defect_replay][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: Both execution_notes.md and result.md anchor the evaluation to Phase 4a: execution_notes.md: "Phase alignment check (phase4a) - The determination is anchored to Phase 4a per references/phase4a-contract.md..."; result.md: "Primary phase under test: Phase 4a" and "Pass/Fail determination (Phase 4a-aligned)" with rationale tied to Phase 4a contract requirements ("atomic action chain" + "observable verification leaves").
